policyItems.rangerPolicyName: database=* - allow anyone to create database; grant owner all access
database=* - allow anyone to create database; grant owner all access
database=*,table=* - allow owner all access to table
database=*;table=*;column=* - allow owner all access to column

generatedSQL:
-- ⚠ Ranger policy targets database=* (all schemas in the cluster).
-- UC equivalent is a catalog-level grant on `main`.
-- Only USE CATALOG, CREATE SCHEMA, and ALL PRIVILEGES are valid at catalog level.
-- Other privileges (SELECT, MODIFY, etc.) must be granted per-schema or per-table.
GRANT USE CATALOG ON CATALOG `main` TO `public`;

-- ⚠ Ranger policy targets database=* (all schemas in the cluster).
-- UC equivalent is a catalog-level grant on `main`.
-- Only USE CATALOG, CREATE SCHEMA, and ALL PRIVILEGES are valid at catalog level.
-- Other privileges (SELECT, MODIFY, etc.) must be granted per-schema or per-table.
GRANT USE CATALOG ON CATALOG `main` TO `public`;
-- GRANT CREATE ON CATALOG — not valid in UC; grant on individual schemas or tables instead.

-- ⚠ Ranger policy targets database=* (all schemas in the cluster).
-- UC equivalent is a catalog-level grant on `main`.
-- Only USE CATALOG, CREATE SCHEMA, and ALL PRIVILEGES are valid at catalog level.
-- Other privileges (SELECT, MODIFY, etc.) must be granted per-schema or per-table.
GRANT USE CATALOG ON CATALOG `main` TO `{OWNER}@company.com`;
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON CATALOG `main` TO `{OWNER}@company.com`;

-- ⚠ Ranger policy targets database=* (all schemas in the cluster).
-- UC equivalent is a catalog-level grant on `main`.
-- Only USE CATALOG, CREATE SCHEMA, and ALL PRIVILEGES are valid at catalog level.
-- Other privileges (SELECT, MODIFY, etc.) must be granted per-schema or per-table.
GRANT USE CATALOG ON CATALOG `main` TO `{OWNER}@company.com`;
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON CATALOG `main` TO `{OWNER}@company.com`;

-- ⚠ Ranger policy targets database=* (all schemas in the cluster).
-- UC equivalent is a catalog-level grant on `main`.
-- Only USE CATALOG, CREATE SCHEMA, and ALL PRIVILEGES are valid at catalog level.
-- Other privileges (SELECT, MODIFY, etc.) must be granted per-schema or per-table.
GRANT USE CATALOG ON CATALOG `main` TO `{OWNER}@company.com`;
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON CATALOG `main` TO `{OWNER}@company.com`;
